news.headline: Constellation HomeBuilder Systems introduces NX™ ERP software for homebuilders to modernize operations. Feb. 18, 2025 article.
news.summary: A state-of-the-art enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, called NX™, has been introduced by Constellation HomeBuilder Systems to cater specifically to the needs of the production homebuilding sector. This advanced all-in-one solution is designed to streamline operations and enhance efficiency. The announcement was made in Toronto on Feb. 18, 2025. NX™ offers cutting-edge features and tools tailored to boost productivity and meet the unique demands of the industry. The software promises to revolutionize the way homebuilders manage their projects and maximize their output.

news.headline: Ophthalmic knives market reached $385.70 million in 2023, projected to hit $565.88 million by 2032 with a 4.3% CAGR.
news.summary: The global ophthalmic knives market is experiencing significant growth, with revenues reaching $385.70 million in 2023 and projected to rise to $565.88 million by 2032, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.3% from 2024 to 2032. This growth is attributed to factors such as the increasing prevalence of eye disorders, advancements in ophthalmic surgery techniques, a growing aging population, and rising awareness about advanced surgical options. The market is driven by demand for specialized knives that ensure precision and minimize complications in surgeries related to eye disorders like cataracts and retinal diseases. Continuous innovations in knife design and materials are also contributing to enhancing performance and patient outcomes in this sector.

news.headline: Cohesity appoints Carol Carpenter as Chief Marketing Officer, bringing over 20 years of experience.
news.summary: Cohesity, a renowned AI-powered data security firm based in Santa Clara, California, has appointed Carol Carpenter as their Chief Marketing Officer. With over two decades of experience in technology industry and marketing, Carpenter will oversee all global marketing initiatives for Cohesity. The company aims to strengthen its position as the leader in data protection market after finalizing the merger with Veritas’ enterprise data. This move comes at a pivotal time as Cohesity solidifies its #1 status in the market.

news.headline: Samsung Canada wins Bronze at International CX Awards 2024 for 'Best Use of Omni Channel', showcasing commitment to seamless customer service.
news.summary: In November 2024 at the International CX Awards, Samsung Electronics Canada Customer Service was honored for its innovative Omni-channel customer experiences. Winning the Bronze Award for 'Best Use of omni-channel', the company showcases its dedication to delivering exceptional service through various platforms. Samsung's recognition underscores its commitment to providing top-notch customer service, showcasing their success in this category. The case study centered on Samsung's Omni A strategy, demonstrating their prowess in creating seamless experiences for customers.

news.headline: Tyler Technologies listed among Forbes' "America’s Best Large Employers" for 2025, 2nd year in a row. #TYL #TylerTech
news.summary: A technology company based in Plano, Texas, Tyler Technologies has been recognized for the second year in a row on Forbes' list of "America's Best Large Employers" for 2025. Tyler Technologies' inclusion in this prestigious list highlights its commitment to providing an excellent work environment for its employees.

news.headline: Portfolio data for Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund as of Jan. 31, 2025, now available. NYSE: FMN.
news.summary: February 18, 2025 - Pittsburgh - Federated Hermes, Inc. (NYSE: FHI), a prominent figure in active investing worldwide, disclosed the monthly fund composition and performance figures for Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund (NYSE: FMN) as of January 31, 2025. This data is now accessible to the public.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: US real home price appreciation aligns with sustainable price trends.
Overwatch Capital buys 150,000 SF data center in Plano, Texas.
news.summary: Overwatch Capital, a firm specializing in AI infrastructure, has recently completed the acquisition of a high-density data center facility in Plano, Texas. The facility spans an impressive 150,000 square feet and marks a significant investment in the region's growing tech sector.

news.headline: Kirstin Vracko to Judge World Alcohol-Free Awards in London, founder of Cheeky & Dry Non-Alcoholic Bottle Shop.
news.summary: In Seattle on February 18, 2025, the Cheeky & Dry Non-Alcoholic Bottle Shop shared the exciting news that its founder and owner, Kirstin Vracko, has been chosen as a judge for the esteemed World Alcohol-Free Awards. The event is scheduled to occur in London from March 9 to 11. Vracko's appointment as a judge alongside just one other individual highlights her expertise and recognition in the non-alcoholic beverage industry.

news.headline: Hershey reaffirms earnings outlook for 2025 at CAGNY conference. CEO and CFO present.
news.summary: Hershey, Pennsylvania - On February 18, 2025, the Chairman, President, and CEO Michele G. Buck, and Senior VP and CFO Steven E. Voskuil, presented at the 2025 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) conference. The speakers discussed key financial information and strategies for the company. The conference was attended by a significant number of industry analysts and investors, showcasing Hershey's commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement. This event provided insights into Hershey's future plans and financial outlook, as well as an opportunity for stakeholders to interact with key members of the company's leadership.

news.headline: 2025 model ROG Flow Z13 announced by ASUS ROG - 13" premium gaming tablet with powerful performance and Nebula display, available for pre-order.
news.summary: A cutting-edge gaming tablet featuring a remarkable ROG Nebula display in a compact 13" design has been unveiled in Fremont. The ASUS Republic of Gamers (ROG) has introduced the latest model, the 2025 ROG Flow Z13, now open for pre-orders. This high-performance 2-in-1 gaming tablet offers a powerful experience for gamers looking for exceptional visuals and functionality in a portable package.

news.headline: Cindi Bulla of Amarillo Association named 2024 Texas REALTOR® of the Year at Winter Meeting in 2025 Austi.
news.summary: Cindi Bulla from the Amarillo Association of REALTORS® was recognized as the 2024 Texas REALTOR® of the Year at the 2025 Winter Meeting in AUSTIN, Texas. This prestigious honor was bestowed upon her for her outstanding contributions to the real estate industry. Bulla, who started her real estate journey in 1996, received this accolade in front of a distinguished audience at the Texas REALTORS® Winter Meeting. This recognition highlights her dedication and expertise in the field.

news.headline: Neuroscientist Matthew Anderson named Co-Director of Oxford-Harrington Rare Disease Centre, enhancing rare disease research.
news.summary: A well-known neuroscientist and Harvard professor from the United States is leveraging their broad experience in academia and the industry to propel rare disease research forward in Oxford, England and Cleveland. The Oxford-Harrington Rare Disease Centre ('OHC'), a collaboration between the University of...

news.headline: HIMIAO introduces revolutionary fur care product for cats, as China's pet cat population exceeds 71.53 million.
news.summary: In Xi'an, China, as of February 18, 2025, there has been a significant increase in the population of cat owners. Based on the 2025 White Paper on China's Pet Industry, it was reported that the quantity of pet cats in China exceeded 71.53 million by the end of 2024. This represents approximately 57.6% of all households that own pets, showcasing a rising trend in cat ownership within the country.

news.headline: Leviton introduces immersive Customer Experience Center in Nashville offering hands-on training and demos. MELVILLE, N.Y., Feb 13, 2025 - PRNewswire.
news.summary: MELVILLE, N.Y. - A recently opened facility is offering practical training and demonstrations of integrated electrical and network infrastructure solutions. Leviton, a top manufacturer specializing in electrical, lighting, data networks, and energy management solutions, is behind this initiative. The facility aims to provide hands-on experience and showcase demos to customers. The launch took place on Feb. 13, 2025.

news.headline: Chicken N Pickle employees in 11 markets grow mustaches in Feb to raise $40,000+ for pediatric hospice organizations.
news.summary: In February, employees at Chicken N Pickle have participated in a mustache challenge to aid children battling life-threatening conditions. Over $40,000 has been raised by Chicken N Pickle for pediatric hospice organizations during Mustache Month. Supporters can contribute to numerous local causes by participating.

news.headline: Bestselling author Jon Acuff will keynote GS1 Connect 2025 conference, sharing supply chain best practices.
news.summary: A three-day conference will be held on June ..., 2025 in Ewing, New Jersey, to discuss supply chain best practices and innovation through the utilization of GS1 standards. The event, known as GS1 Connect®, will feature Jon Acuff, a bestselling author from "New York Times," as a keynote speaker. The conference aims to share insights on leveraging GS1 standards to drive innovation in supply chain management. This live event is expected to attract a significant number of industry professionals and experts for a valuable exchange of ideas and strategies.

news.headline: Lisa Diamantis appointed VP of Sales & Marketing at ConnectDER to boost solar & EV industry growth. Expanding market reach.
news.summary: Lisa Diamantis has recently been appointed at ConnectDER to spearhead sales and marketing strategies, broaden market penetration, and drive growth within clean energy domains. ConnectDER, a key player offering cutting-edge electrical solutions for the solar sector, made the announcement on February 18, 2025, in Philadelphia. This move aims to boost their presence and enhance sales in the clean energy sector under Diamantis' leadership.

news.headline: Montana Renewables receives $782 million from $1.44 billion DOE loan facility for Sustainable Aviation Fuel expansion.
news.summary: Today, a loan of $782 million has been granted, with the rest of the funds to be provided during a planned expansion phase from 2025 to 2028. The loan guarantee from the Department of Energy (DOE) will enable the increase of Sustainable Aviation Fuel capacity to 300 million gallons annually. This development is set to take place in Indianapolis.

news.headline: GrubMarket acquires Bay Cities Produce to expand in Northern California foodservice industry, Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in San Francisco, GrubMarket, a leading AI technology company revolutionizing the American food supply chain sector and one of the top private food eCommerce businesses worldwide, revealed the finalization of its acquisition of Bay. This move solidifies GrubMarket's position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: TransUnion Kenya and FICO introduce new risk solutions in Kenya to expand credit access, empowering financial institutions.
news.summary: In Kenya, TransUnion, a prominent global information and insights company, along with FICO, a leading global analytics software provider, are at the forefront of revolutionizing the nation's financial sector. They are introducing innovative risk solutions aimed at expanding credit access and supporting financial institutions. Through advanced data and analytics, lenders can now enhance decision-making processes, ultimately promoting economic empowerment and strengthening the financial ecosystem. This initiative is poised to have a significant impact on the country's financial landscape, potentially benefiting a vast number of individuals and institutions.

news.headline: EHS leaders struggle to improve safety with stagnant or worsening injury stats: 53% frequency, 51% severity.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, a recent report by Benchmark Gensuite revealed concerning trends in the field of Environmental Health & Safety (EHS). The 2025 EHS Benchmarking report shows that more than half of EHS leaders surveyed, around 53%, noted that injury frequency has either stayed the same or increased over the past year. Similarly, 51% of respondents reported that injury severity has not improved. The study, based on insights from over 100 EHS professionals in various industries, emphasizes ongoing issues like high turnover rates, inadequate training, and underrepresentation within the workforce. These findings indicate a pressing need for organizations to address these challenges to ensure a safer work environment.

news.headline: CMD+CTRL Security signs CISA Secure by Design pledge to integrate security principles in software dev, aiding in prioritizing security; reinforcing commitment.
news.summary: A software security training company, CMD+CTRL Security, based in Wilmington, Mass., has recently pledged its commitment to promote secure development practices in organizations. This pledge was made by signing the Secure by Design initiative developed by the U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA). By integrating CISA's Secure by Design principles into their development processes, CMD+CTRL Security aims to assist software manufacturers in prioritizing security throughout their software development lifecycle. This initiative underscores the company's dedication to enhancing security practices and fostering a more secure environment.

news.headline: Domain Money in NYC has added 3 CFP® pros to bolster their team. Their growth peaked in 2024, surpassing a significant milestone.
news.summary: In New York, Domain Money, a financial planning platform with a flat fee structure, has bolstered its team by bringing on board three experienced CERTIFIED FINANCIAL PLANNERS®. These professionals are dedicated to ensuring client success, enhancing Domain's capacity to offer tailored financial advice that enables individuals to manage their finances effectively and strive for lasting stability. In 2024, Domain experienced significant expansion and crossed a significant milestone, solidifying its position in the industry.

news.headline: ventureLAB appoints Garry Chan as Head of AI Initiatives to advance hardtech companies and boost Canada's economy.
news.summary: In MARKHAM, Ontario, ventureLAB, a prominent global founder community supporting hardware and enterprise software companies, has appointed Garry Chan as its Head of AI Initiatives, who became a part of ventureLAB in 2019. This significant move underlines ventureLAB's commitment to empowering hardtech founders in developing and expanding globally competitive ventures that contribute to Canada's knowledge-based economy. This appointment aligns with ventureLAB's strategic approach of establishing Can.

news.headline: Veeam simplifies disaster recovery for Microsoft Hyper-V with new orchestration feature in Data Platform Premium.
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent announcement states that the Veeam Data Platform Premium now includes orchestration for Hyper-V, further enhancing data protection capabilities. This addition expands data portability and enables seamless planned data migration, ensuring a comprehensive end-to-end solution. This development emphasizes Veeam's commitment to providing robust data management tools, offering enhanced flexibility for users.

news.headline: Chile's Cugat supermarket chain boosts efficiency with Toshiba's Self Checkout to enhance shopper experience.
news.summary: A major supermarket chain in Chile, Cugat, has recently enhanced its operations by introducing the Self Checkout system by Toshiba. This move is aimed at boosting efficiency and promoting innovation within the company.

news.headline: Global microbiology culture market valued at $7.8B in 2022, set to reach $13.6B by 2031 with 6.4% CAGR growth driven by biopharmaceutical and food safety demand. Key players like Thermo Fisher Scientific and Merck Group investing in innovative solutions to meet growing industry demands.
news.summary: The global microbiology culture market reached a value of $7.8 billion in 2022 and is expected to surpass $13.6 billion by 2031, showing a CAGR of 6.4% from 2023 to 2031. This growth is driven by demand from sectors like pharmaceuticals, food safety testing, and clinical research. Key companies in this market include Thermo Fisher Scientific, Merck Group, BD, and HiMedia Laboratories, investing in innovative solutions to meet the increasing demand. Factors contributing to growth include rising healthcare spending, focus on quality assurance in food production, and pharmaceutical manufacturing expansion. The importance of microbial studies has increased due to antimicrobial resistance and evolving healthcare needs, exemplified during the COVID-19 pandemic. Despite challenges like rising operational costs and storage needs, the market outlook remains positive. Leading players are enhancing their microbiology culture products to address antimicrobial resistance and to improve their positions in the industry, underscoring the pivotal role microbiology plays in global health and development.

news.headline: Demand surges for XTM's AnyDay™ EWA and tip-out calculator amid interest in tip tax elimination, hundreds impacted.
news.summary: In Toronto, XTM Inc. is seeing a rise in interest for its AnyDay™ Earned Wage Access (EWA) platform and instant tip-out calculator solution. The fintech company, traded as OTC: XTMIF / CSE: PAID / FSE: 7XT, specializes in payment solutions for hospitality. This surge in interest follows President Trump's pledge to remove taxes on tips, potentially impacting the industry. XTM currently serves hundreds of customers and is becoming a key player in the sector.

news.headline: Bloomerang report reveals gap in donor-nonprofit alignment, aims to improve donor retention for long-term sustainability.
news.summary: Fresh insights from Bloomerang's Mission Retainable Report shed light on enhancing donor retention for nonprofits, promoting sustainable fundraising. Released on Feb. 18, 2025, the report emphasizes aligning with donor expectations to ensure lasting financial support. As a key player in fundraising and volunteer management, Bloomerang aims to help organizations boost donor retention rates and achieve long-term sustainability in fundraising efforts.

news.headline: Pet Dental Health Month in February promotes preventing gum disease, a common dog health concern. Bow Wow Labs offers safe chew toys like Bow Wow Buddy® from Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In honor of Pet Dental Health Month in February, it's crucial to address gum disease, a prevalent issue in dogs. To combat this, utilizing safe dental chews is recommended, such as the Bow Wow Buddy® crafted by Bow Wow Labs, a leading innovator in pet products. This approach helps in maintaining oral hygiene for dogs, reducing the risk of gum disease. This initiative aligns with the focus on promoting canine wellness. The initiative was highlighted in Austin, Texas, on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Growth equities rise in 2025 as the 'Magnificent Seven' lose ground, impacting the market significantly.
ECB's Cipollone: The ECB must be flexible to expand liquidity, if required.
Bloomberg Surveillance TV details important economic data on February 18, 2025.
ECB's Cipollone: Rates must compensate for the shrinking balance sheet.
China announces milestone for 'Origin Wukong' quantum computing machine, boosting stocks. (Characters: 76)
news.summary: China has announced a significant advancement in quantum computing technology with their 'Origin Wukong' machine. This development is expected to impact quantum computing stocks positively. The news comes amidst DeepSeek updates.

news.headline: Moderna stock recovers on CEO's response to RFK Jr. concerns. Is MRNA stock a good buy post fourth-quarter report?
news.summary: After CEO Stephane Bancel addressed concerns related to RFK Jr., Moderna stock rebounded following its fourth-quarter report. Investors are questioning if purchasing MRNA stock is a wise decision amid these developments.

news.headline: Baidu's stock drops due to ad slump affecting sales, despite company's AI momentum. Core business struggles.
news.summary: Leaders at Baidu reported that the company is experiencing positive momentum in artificial intelligence (AI). However, despite this progress, the company's primary business is currently facing challenges. Recently, Baidu's stock has dropped due to a decrease in advertising sales, which has negatively impacted overall revenue. This decline comes at a time when the company is emphasizing its advancements in AI technology.

news.headline: Medtronic stock drops 5% as it misses sales expectations but exceeds profit forecasts, affecting buy zone.
news.summary: Shares of Medtronic dropped significantly on Tuesday following lower-than-expected sales figures, despite exceeding profit forecasts. The medtech company experienced a 5% decrease, causing its stock to fall below the buy zone.

news.headline: Sapio Sciences appoints Mike Hampton as CCO to drive growth and innovation in drug discovery.
news.summary: Sapio Sciences, a lab informatics platform, made significant leadership changes to advance drug discovery and enhance AI-driven lab informatics. Mike Hampton has been appointed as the Chief Commercial Officer (CCO), and a new Scientific Office has been established. These changes emphasize Sapio's dedication to scientific and customer-focused advancement. Hampton will lead commercial strategy and operations in his role as CCO, as Sapio aims to strengthen its position in the industry.

news.headline: G2 Risk Solutions buys ZignSec AB to expand risk management offering, focusing on technology-driven compliance.
news.summary: A company based in Burlingame, California, G2 Risk Solutions, has recently revealed the acquisition of ZignSec AB. This acquisition is a strategic move aimed at improving G2RS’ array of compliance and risk solutions through advanced technology. This development signifies a significant step for G2 Risk Solutions in bolstering its offerings in the compliance and risk sector.

news.headline: Brother's Bond Bourbon receives $7.5M in new funding, showcasing investor confidence in the award-winning brand.
news.summary: Investor confidence has driven the success story of Brother's Bond Bourbon, an acclaimed American whiskey brand established by Ian Somerhalder and his fellow whiskey expert and longtime friend. The brand, based in Plano, Texas, has garnered significant attention for its commitment to passion, craftsmanship, and fostering connections. The company's growth and positive reception have been reflected in key financial indicators, with the latest data showing a notable increase in investor confidence. This has propelled the brand's dedication to producing high-quality whiskey and solidifying its position in the market. Brother's Bond Bourbon continues to impress consumers and investors alike with its exceptional offerings and visionary approach to the spirits industry.

news.headline: K-Beauty brand ANUA expands to 1,400 Ulta Beauty stores in North America, strengthening its presence. CEO: Seonhyeong Lee.
news.summary: SEOUL, South Korea, Feb. 18, 2025: The Founders, a global brand-building firm helmed by Co-CEOs Seonhyeong Lee and Changju Lee, announced its expansion of K-beauty brand ANUA to Ulta Beauty, the largest beauty retailer in the nation. This move aims to strengthen ANUA's footprint in North America.

news.headline: Straight Talk Wireless offers rewards for unlimited data usage with The Data Bank event in NY & NJ; happening on Feb 18 & 19.
news.summary: In New York, Straight Talk Wireless, a prepaid brand on Verizon's 5G network and available at Walmart, is introducing a new promotion called The Data Bank. This event, held at Union Square Park on February 18 and Kennedy Commons in East New Jersey on February 19, rewards customers for their mobile data usage. The promotion highlights the value of Straight Talk's unlimited data plans. The Data Bank provides real financial incentives for data usage, showcasing the benefits of Straight Talk's offerings.

news.headline: The HRT Club launches to revolutionize U.S. hormone care, aiming to disrupt $7.4B market with 3,000+ patients & 700+ providers in 42 states.
news.summary: A reputable company in Bridgewater, New Jersey, The HRT Club, has unveiled its direct-to-consumer hormone replacement therapy to the public after a successful soft launch in April 2024. This innovative solution is set to revolutionize the U.S. hormonal care industry valued at $7.4 billion. With more than 3,000 patient members and an extensive network of over 700 providers spanning 42 states, The HRT Club aims to democratize access to hormone treatments.

news.headline: Positive Beverage introduces new brand and ingredients, removing erythritol to focus on health, reaffirming commitment to clean living.
news.summary: Positive Beverage, a company based in Newport Beach, California, has recently revealed a new look and improved ingredients for its products. The company has eliminated erythritol from its beverages as part of its dedication to promoting health and positivity. This move aims to enhance the quality of their products and ensure alignment with their health-focused values.

news.headline: SBA Communications CEO to speak at Citi's conference on March 4, 2025, at 2:55pm ET. Event in Florida. Website for audio presentation: www.sbasite.com.
news.summary: SBA Communications Corporation (NASDAQ: SBAC) from Boca Raton, Florida, has disclosed that their President and CEO, Brendan Cavanagh, will be presenting at Citi’s 30th Annual Global Property CEO Conference on March 4, 2025, at 2:55pm ET. The event is set to take place at The Diplomat Resort & Spa in Hollywood, Florida. For those interested, the audio presentation for SBA can be listened to on their website, www.sbasite.com. SBA Communications Corporation is renowned for its expertise in the industry.

news.headline: Los Angeles-Long Beach-Glendale home prices drop by 1.9% year over year in January, as per First American Data & Analytics report.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), unveiled its January 2025 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report, which monitors home price fluctuations closely aligned with real-time data, covers national, state, and metropolitan levels, including Core-Based Statistical Areas. It also offers insights into various metropolitan price tiers.

news.headline: Interface marks 25 years of i2 with two new carpet tile collections, Material Impressions™ and Open Road™.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Interface has introduced two fresh carpet tile lines, Material Impressions™ and Open Road™, to enhance its i2™ collection.

news.headline: National house price growth at slowest pace since summer 2023 per First American Data report. #RealEstate #MarketTrends
news.summary: Santa Ana, California - First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), has unveiled its January 2025 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This leading national provider of property-centric information, risk management, and valuation solutions presents data on home price changes nationwide, at state and metropolitan levels (Core-Based Statistical Areas), and within metropolitan price tiers. The report is updated less than four weeks behind real-time, offering crucial insights into the housing market.
